judgment.summary: High-growth, high-margin business with exceptional returns on equity and massive free cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 2.01 beat the 1.94 estimate (3.5% surprise); next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Return on equity 141.5% — exceptional capital efficiency
Free cash flow $101.09B (TTM) — significant cash generation
negatives: Price/Book 41.35x — high valuation relative to book value
PEG ratio 2.61 — priced at a premium relative to growth

news.paragraph: Apple is reportedly generating high profits and successful products through the use of imperfect chips. While no specific earnings or regulatory catalysts are mentioned in the recent headlines, traders should weigh these profitability reports against broader political scrutiny regarding major technology companies.
